pr.title: Non-record: Depth recurrence + widening + QAT + sliding window eval

output.summary: Recycles 3 transformer blocks with per-loop LoRA, widens to 768 dim, uses factorized embeddings plus int6 QAT, and evaluates with sliding windows.
techniques: Depth recurrence with per-loop rank-4 LoRA adapters
Factorized SP4096 embedding into 128 bottleneck and widened 768-dim GQA
Int6-range QAT (STE) paired with sliding-window eval and NTK-aware RoPE
